name: PDF and image text extraction with AI
description: Lists files from Google Drive, downloads them, uses Claude AI to extract and structure text from PDFs and images, then posts the structured results to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's Vertex AI Gemini text extraction workflow.

source.originalName: Extract text from PDF and image using Vertex AI (Gemini) into CSV

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for listing and downloading files

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting extraction results

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the extracted text results

folderId.description: Google Drive folder ID containing PDF and image files to process

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to process (default: 5)

steps.name: List files from Google Drive folder

queryParams.q: '$.input.folderId' in parents and (mimeType='application/pdf' or mimeType contains 'image/')

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for text extraction
Build Slack Block Kit message with extraction results
